datasheets.name: Crusaders
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: power weapon.

abilities.name: Spiritual Fortitude
abilities.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: ATTACHED UNIT
abilities.description: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

datasheets.name: Death Cult Assassins
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: Death Cult power blades.

abilities.name: Death Cult
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, re-roll a Wound roll.

datasheets.name: Arco-flagellants
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: arco-flails.

abilities.name: Extremis Trigger Word
abilities.description: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

datasheets.name: Penitent Engines
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: penitent flamers; twin penitent buzz-blades.

abilities.name: Endless Suffering
abilities.description: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

datasheets.name: Saint Celestine
datasheets.loadout:
Saint Celestine is equipped with: the Ardent Blade.

Each Geminae Superia is equipped with: bolt pistol; power weapon.

abilities.name: Healing Tears
abilities.description: While this unit contains a Celestine model, in your Command phase, if this unit is below its Starting Strength, either one destroyed Geminae Superia model or up to D3 other Bodyguard models are returned to this unit.

abilities.name: Lifewards
abilities.description: While this unit contains one or more Geminae Superia models, Celestine has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Miraculous Intervention
abilities.description: The first time this unit’s Celestine model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that Celestine model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

datasheets.name: Canoness
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistol; hallowed chainsword.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
weapons.abilities: anti-psyker 2+, devastating wounds, precision, rapid fire 1

abilities.name: Sacred Command
abilities.description: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: The Emperor’s Grace
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Null Rod
abilities.description: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Rod of Office
abilities.description: Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

datasheets.name: Imagifier
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistol; boltgun; close combat weapon.

abilities.name: Litany of Deeds
abilities.description: Each time you gain a Miracle dice as the result of an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit or model from your army being destroyed, if that unit or model was destroyed within 12" of this model, you can re-roll the result of that Miracle dice before adding it to your Miracle dice pool.

abilities.name: Stanchion of Holy Martyrs
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Save characteristic of 2+ and a 4+ invulnerable save.

datasheets.name: Hospitaller
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistol; chirurgeon’s tools.

abilities.name: Medicus Ministorum
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Sacred Healing
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to 1 destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit. If you wish, you can first discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit instead.

datasheets.name: Dialogus
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistol; Dialogus staff.

abilities.name: Laud Hailer
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: Stirring Rhetoric
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time this model’s unit performs an Act of Faith, the value of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first changed to a 6.

datasheets.name: Battle Sisters Squad
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: bolt pistol; boltgun; close combat weapon.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
weapons.abilities: ANTI-PSYKER 2+, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, RAPID FIRE 1

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.description:
Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
Designer’s Note: Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Defenders of the Faith
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

datasheets.name: Seraphim Squad
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: 2 bolt pistols; close combat weapon.

abilities.name: Angelic Ascent
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

datasheets.name: Repentia Squad
datasheets.loadout:
The Repentia Superior is equipped with: bolt pistol; neural whips.

Each Sister Repentia is equipped with: penitent eviscerator.

abilities.name: Overseer of Redemption
abilities.description: While this unit contains a Repentia Superior model, each time a Sisters Repentia model in this unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

datasheets.name: Retributor Squad
datasheets.loadout:
The Retributor Superior is equipped with: bolt pistol; boltgun; close combat weapon.

Each Retributor is equipped with: bolt pistol; heavy bolter; close combat weapon.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
weapons.abilities: ANTI-PSYKER 2+, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, PRECISION, RAPID FIRE 1

abilities.name: Cherubs
abilities.description:
Twice per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
Designer’s Note: Place two Cherub tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Storm of Retribution
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If such an attack targets an enemy unit that has destroyed one or more Adepta Sororitas units from your army during the battle, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

datasheets.name: Dominion Squad
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: bolt pistol; boltgun; close combat weapon.

weapons.name: Condemnor boltgun
weapons.abilities: anti-psyker 2+, devastating wounds, precision, rapid fire 1

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.description:
Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.
Designer’s Note: Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Righteous Awareness
abilities.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.name: Holy Vanguard
abilities.description: If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step and this unit starts the battle embarked within a TRANSPORT, that Leader unit gains the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

datasheets.name: Sororitas Rhino
datasheets.transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adepta Sororitas Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: storm bolter; armoured tracks.

abilities.name: Self Repair
abilities.description: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

datasheets.name: Immolator
datasheets.transport:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adepta Sororitas Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Battle Sisters Squad, Dominion Squad or Sisters Novitiate Squad from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another Transport, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: heavy bolter; immolation flamers; armoured tracks.

abilities.name: Purge and Cleanse
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

datasheets.name: Exorcist
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: Exorcist missile launcher; heavy bolter; armoured tracks.
datasheets.damagedDescription: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Devastating Refrain
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time such an attack destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of on a 6.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

datasheets.name: Repressor
datasheets.transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adepta Sororitas Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: Repressor twin heavy flamer; storm bolter; dozer ram.
datasheets.damagedDescription: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Emergency Combat Embarkation
abilities.description: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this TRANSPORT, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

datasheets.name: Ministorum Priest
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: zealot’s vindictor.

abilities.name: Righteous Smiting
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Zealot
abilities.description: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

abilities.name: Holy Mission
abilities.description: If this model is attached to a DOMINION SQUAD during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Scouts 6" ability. If this model is attached to a SISTERS NOVITIATE SQUAD during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Infiltrators ability.

datasheets.name: Triumph Of Saint Katherine
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistols; relic weapons.
datasheets.damagedDescription: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, the Attacks characteristics of all of its weapons are halved, and you can only select one ability when using its Relics of the Matriarchs ability, instead of up to two.

abilities.name: Relics of the Matriarchs
abilities.description: At the start of the battle round, select up to two of the abilities in the Relics of the Matriarchs section (see left). Until the start of the next battle round, this model has those abilities.

abilities.name: Solemn Procession
abilities.description: Each time you gain 1 Miracle dice at the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, do not roll one D6 to determine the value of that Miracle dice; it has a value of 6.

abilities.name: The Fiery Heart (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 6" of this model, add 2" to that unit's Move characteristic and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Censer of the Sacred Rose (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abilities.name: Simulacrum of the Ebon Chalice (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of only one.

abilities.name: Simulacrum of the Argent Shroud (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Icon of the Valorous Heart (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abilities.name: Petals of the Bloody Rose (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

datasheets.name: Junith Eruita
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: twin Ministorum heavy flamer; Mace of Castigation.

abilities.name: The Pulpit of Saint Holline’s Basilica
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Fiery Conviction
abilities.description:
If this model is on the battlefield at the start of your Command phase, you can choose one of the following:
  • Discard 1 Miracle dice and gain 1CP.
  • Take a Leadership test for this model, if that test is passed, gain 1CP.

datasheets.name: Zephyrim Squad
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: bolt pistol; power weapon.

abilities.name: Embodied Prophecy
abilities.description:
Each time this unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase:
  • [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
  • [LETHAL HITS]
If this unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, select both abilities above to apply to melee weapons equipped by models in this unit instead.

abilities.name: Sacred Banner
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

datasheets.name: Mortifiers
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: 2 heavy bolters; twin penitent buzz-blades.

abilities.name: Anguish of the Unredeemed
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Anchorite Sarcophagus
abilities.description: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 7" and a Save characteristic of 3+.

datasheets.name: Battle Sanctum
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: nothing.

abilities.name: Consecrated Ground
abilities.description: When this FORTIFICATION is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1" of another part. Friendly Adepta Sororitas Infantry models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this FORTIFICATION. While an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army is within 1" of this FORTIFICATION, that unit can perform one additional Act of Faith per phase.

abilities.name: Holy Cover
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: FORTIFICATION
abilities.description:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
  • That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
  • Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle- shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

datasheets.name: Palatine
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistol; Palatine blade.

abilities.name: Fury of the Righteous
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Rapturous Blows
abilities.description: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, then until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack made by this model scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

datasheets.name: Morvenn Vahl
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: Fidelis; Paragon missile launcher; Lance of Illumination.

abilities.name: Abbess Sanctorum
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Righteous Repugnance
abilities.description: Each time this model’s unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of Fidelis and the Lance of Illumination. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by this model, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abilities.name: SUPREME COMMANDER
abilities.description: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

datasheets.name: Aestred Thurga And Agathae Dolan
datasheets.loadout:
Aestred Thurga is equipped with: bolt pistol; Blade of Vigil.

Agathae Dolan is equipped with: bolt pistol; scribe’s staff.

abilities.name: Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor’s Judgement
abilities.description: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abilities.name: Recount the Deeds of the Saints
abilities.description: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Agathae Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

datasheets.name: Celestian Sacresants
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: bolt pistol; hallowed mace.

abilities.name: Sworn Protectors
abilities.description: While an ADEPTA SORORITAS CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

datasheets.name: Dogmata
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: bolt pistol; mace of the righteous.

abilities.name: Executioner of Heretics (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Unflinching Determination
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

datasheets.name: Paragon Warsuits
datasheets.loadout: Every model is equipped with: bolt pistol; heavy bolter; Paragon storm bolters; Paragon war blade.

abilities.name: Righteous Paragons
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

datasheets.damagedDescription: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Rites of Castigation
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

abilities.name: Impetuous Fervour
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Sacred Banner
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

datasheets.name: Daemonifuge
datasheets.loadout:
Ephrael Stern is equipped with: bolt pistol; Sanctity.

Kyganil of the Bloody Tears is equipped with: the Outcast’s Weapons.

abilities.name: Holy Judgement
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this unit's Ephrael Stern model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is a CHAOS unit. If the test is failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Mysterious Saviours
abilities.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

datasheets.name: Canoness with Jump Pack
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: blessed halberd.

abilities.name: Sacred Command
abilities.description: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Divine Deliverance
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

datasheets.name: Celestian Sacresant Aveline
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: Ministorum hand flamer; The Thorn of the White Rose.

weapons.name: The Thorn of the White Rose

abilities.name: Instrument of the Emperor’s Wrath
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Daemonbreaker
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a DAEMON unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

datasheets.name: Sanctifiers
datasheets.loadout:
The Miraculist is equipped with: holy fire; burning hands.

The Salvationist is equipped with: close combat weapon; Salvationist medikit.

The Death Cult Assassin is equipped with: Death Cult blades.

1 Missionary is equipped with: plasma gun; Sanctifier melee weapon.

1 Missionary is equipped with: Ministorum flamer; Sanctifier melee weapon.

Every Sanctifier is equipped with: Ministorum hand flamer; Sanctifier melee weapon.

abilities.name: One Shot
abilities.description: The bearer can only shoot with this weapon once per battle.

abilities.name: Ministorum Sermon
abilities.description: While this unit contains a MINISTORUM PRIEST, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Cherub
abilities.description:
Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

Designer’s Note: Place a Cherub token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

abilities.name: ATTACHED UNIT
abilities.description: If a Ministorum Priest from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a MINISTORUM PRIEST from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

abilities.name: Salvationist Medikit
abilities.description: In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) to this unit.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

datasheets.name: Celestian Insidiants
datasheets.loadout: Each model is equipped with: condemnor bolt pistol; null mace.

abilities.name: Rituale Nullificatus
abilities.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Virtue of Intolerance
abilities.description: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets its quarry, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability and you can re-roll the Hit roll. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a Transport.

abilities.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

abilities.name: Denuncia Oratory
abilities.description: Each time the bearer’s unit’s quarry is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its quarry.

abilities.name: ATTACHED UNIT
abilities.description: If a Character unit from your army can be attached to a Dominion Squad unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

datasheets.name: Intranzia Fraye
datasheets.loadout: This model is equipped with: 2 heavy bolters, 2 Ministorum heavy flamers; 1 melta missile array; 1 Mace of Saint Praxedes; 1 Throne of Blame.

abilities.name: Righteous Denunciation
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Judged for Execution
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

rule.name: Sacred Rites
rule.legend: At times of war, the Adepta Sororitas make offerings to the Emperor in prayer, incense and blood. In such pious devotion, they may attract his blessings and enact miraculous deeds in his holy name.
rule.description: Each ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of just one.

stratagems.name: FAITH AND FURY
stratagems.type: Army of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The righteous zeal of the Sisters of Battle burns bright as they charge towards their foes.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of your unit's attacks this phase, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

stratagems.name: LIGHT OF THE EMPEROR
stratagems.type: Army of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The Emperor’s radiance shines upon his warriors, magnifying their purity in their darkest hour.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Command phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is blessed. While a unit is blessed, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws). If your unit has the JUMP PACK keyword, until the end of the turn, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is within 3" of your unit, that friendly unit is also blessed.

stratagems.name: SHIELD OF FAITH
stratagems.type: Army of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: There is no armour as resilient as conviction itself.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army suffers a mortal wound.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit, or one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit within 3" of it.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds. If you targeted an ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is unit is within 3" of your unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: DIVINE GUIDANCE
stratagems.type: Army of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: With miraculous precision, the blows of the Sisters of Battle strike the weak points of enemy armour.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

stratagems.name: BLINDING RADIANCE
stratagems.type: Army of Faith – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The Emperor's divinity manifests in golden halos, blinding the enemy with radiant light.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks, or one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit within 3" of such a unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If you targeted an ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army with this Stratagem, then until the end of the phase, while a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit is unit is within 3" of your unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: ANGELIC DESCENT
stratagems.type: Army of Faith – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: On wings of fire do the angelic warriors of the Orders Militant descent to battle.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS JUMP PACK unit from your army.

EFFECT: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

RESTRICTIONS: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

enhancements.name: Litanies of Faith
enhancements.legend: This unassuming parchment is one of the holiest relics in the Ministorum's charge, its mere presence enough to fill the hearts of the faithful with righteous fervour.
enhancements.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for the bearer. If that test is passed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Blade of Saint Ellynor
enhancements.legend: Forged from thrice-blessed silver, this blade has the names and deeds of a thousand saints inscribed on one side on the molecular level, while the other has the entire Fede lmperialis etched into its form. The blade glows with righteous power and has slain heretics, mutants and xenos beyond counting.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1, and those weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. In addition, each time the bearer fights, if one or more enemy models are destroyed by those attacks, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Divine Aspect
enhancements.legend: Enemy warriors tremble before the radiant majesty of one blessed by the Emperor.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of the bearer; that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Triptych of the Macharian Crusade
enhancements.legend: Carried onto the most fire-swept of battlefields, the images of the Macharian Trinity glorifies three missionaries who saved thousands of lives. This adamantine-sheathed relic reminds the bearer that faith alone can weather the most grievous adversities.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer uses an Act of Faith to substitute a saving throw, that saving throw is successful, irrespective of the value of the Miracle dice used.

rule.name: Fervent Purgation
rule.legend: These warriors carry the fiery wrath of the Emperor into the darkest corners of his realm. Through the weapons of the faithful is the Master of Mankind’s immortal anger made manifest. With the holy trinity of boltgun, flamer and melta weapons are his enemies purged from the lmperium’s worlds.
rule.description: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTA SORORITAS models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 6", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

stratagems.name: BLAZING IRE
stratagems.type: Bringers of Flame – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The transpans of the Adepta Sororitas are mobile shrines. The Sisters within this vehicle recite psalms of righteous hatred and destruction before emerging to obliterate their foes
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

EFFECT: One unit embarked within your TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: SHIELD OF AVERSION
stratagems.type: Bringers of Flame – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The Sisters of Battle gird themselves with the strength of their faith. It is a shield of repulsion that rejects the heretical cunning of their enemies.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: RIGHTEOUS BLOWS
stratagems.type: Bringers of Flame – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: As the faithful strike their foes in righteous anger, they feel the Emperor's hand adding strength to their blows.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of attacks made by those weapons this phase, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: CLEANSING FLAMES
stratagems.type: Bringers of Flame – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Burn the mutant. Burn the heretic. Burn the witch.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

stratagems.name: RITES OF FIRE
stratagems.type: Bringers of Flame – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: At close range, the Adepta Sororitas unleash the full devastating potential of their blessed weapons.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 6" that is also within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

stratagems.name: CARRY FORTH THE FAITHFUL
stratagems.type: Bringers of Flame – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Congregated within a transport, the Battle Sisters recite bellowing prayers so that the whole vehicle echoes to furious piety.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, just before an ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT model from your army Advances.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS TRANSPORT model.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your TRANSPORT, and units can disembark from your TRANSPORT even though it Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge this turn

enhancements.name: Righteous Rage
enhancements.legend: This servant of the divine draws deeply from their faith, enhancing their physical might.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time the bearer is selected to fight, you can first discard up to 3 Miracle dice. For each Miracle dice just discarded, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons.

enhancements.name: Manual of Saint Griselda
enhancements.legend: Within this tome are the collected writings of Saint Griselda the Pious. The lessons inscribed on its vellum pages teach focus and decisiveness during times of war.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can discard up to 2 Miracle dice. Then, add 1 Miracle dice to your Miracle Dice pool showing a value equal to the sum of the two Miracle dice you just discarded (to a maximum of 6).

enhancements.name: Fire and Fury
enhancements.legend: This warrior is a firebrand zealot without comparison. At their command, the faithful unleash relentless fire upon their chosen foe.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit, and all other ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

enhancements.name: Iron Surplice of Saint Istalela
enhancements.legend: Worked upon by generations of artificers, consecrated with holy oils and steeped in the smoke of sacred incense, this suit of power armour is amongst the most battle-proven relics held by the Orders Militant.
enhancements.description: CANONESS or PALATINE model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

rule.name: Righteous Purpose
rule.legend: Whether high-ranking clergy must be rescued, a priceless relic recovered, or some archheretic slain, these warriors know that to fail after promising victory to the God-Emperor would be infinitely worse than death; this knowledge fills them with righteous purpose and the unflinching will to succeed no matter the odds.
rule.description:
In your Command phase, you can select up to 3 Adepta Sororitas units from your army (including units that are embarked within Transports), until the start of your next Command phase, those units are Righteous. While a unit is Righteous:
  • Add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.
  • Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.
  • Improve the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by Battle Sisters Squad, Celestian Sacresants and Paragon Warsuits models in that unit by 1.

Keywords
While a CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit from your army is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of Celestian Sacresants models in that unit.

stratagems.name: BASTION OF FAITH
stratagems.type: Champions of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Unified in their inviolate dedication to fulfil their oaths to Him on the Throne, the Order’s elite form a rampart of ceramite and unyielding faith to throw back the desperate blows of the foe.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One Celestian Sacresants unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. In addition, if your unit is Righteous, you can select one other CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit from your army that is not Battle-shocked and is within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that CELESTIAN SACRESANTS unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll as well.

stratagems.name: PATH OF THE RIGHTEOUS
stratagems.type: Champions of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: When exemplars of the Imperial Creed stride to do the God-Emperor’s will, little can slow their sacred procession.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, if your unit is Righteous, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stratagems.name: TO THE HEART OF HERESY
stratagems.type: Champions of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Seizing their moment to drive like a burning blade through the enemy lines and complete their holy mission, these faithful strike with unstoppable might.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 as well.

stratagems.name: SHIELD OF DENIAL
stratagems.type: Champions of Faith – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: With so singular and fanatical a purpose, the Adepta Sororitas can will their injuries away, at least until the fight is done.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds instead.

stratagems.name: INDEFATIGABLE DEDICATION
stratagems.type: Champions of Faith – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Such champions of the God-Emperor never stop fighting or striving for victory, transforming momentary retreats into another opportunity to purge the unclean and press on to their objective.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army Falls Back.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is Righteous, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

stratagems.name: SUFFER NOT THE UNFAITHFUL
stratagems.type: Champions of Faith – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: No unclean foe can be permitted to stand between the God-Emperor’s sworn champions and their oathed duty. They must be struck down with unmerciful fury.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that is Righteous and that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

EFFECT: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

enhancements.name: Triptych of Judgement
enhancements.legend: The three windows of this sacred artefact display three aspects of the God-Emperor in judgement over mortal souls. No warrior of faith will countenance failure beneath its threefold gaze.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Mark of Devotion
enhancements.legend: A fresh oath brand burns in this champion’s flesh, its heat remaining miraculously undimmed and its searing pain focusing their devout wrath.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer’s unit is Righteous, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic and add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Eyes of the Oracle
enhancements.legend: Having torn them from the sockets of a heretical witch, this warrior of faith keeps these shrivelled orbs sealed in a miniature reliquary about their neck. They believe that – tormented by holy imprisonment – the traitorous eyes guide their aim towards other infernal champions.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. The bearer’s weapons have the [PRECISION] ability. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Sanctified Amulet
enhancements.legend: Belief radiates out from this blessed icon, forming a holy circle of abjuration that holds at bay the unclean and leaves this champion free to do their duty to the God-Emperor.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

rule.name: The Blood of Martyrs
rule.legend: The blood of martyrs is the life force of the Imperium. So do the tenets of this Order joyously proclaim, and in its warriors’ darkest hour does the sacrifice of their fallen Sisters shine brightest.
rule.description: Each time an ADEPTA SORORITAS model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength.

stratagems.name: RIGHTEOUS VENGEANCE
stratagems.type: Hallowed Martyrs – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: With the Emperor's light upon them, the righteous vengeance of the Sisters af Battle burns brighter.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and, if your unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

stratagems.name: DIVINE INTERVENTION
stratagems.type: Hallowed Martyrs – Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The pious believe that, in their moment of greatest need, the Emperor protects.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase.

TARGET: One Adepta Sororitas Character unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

EFFECT: You can discard 1-3 Miracle dice. At the end of the phase, set the last destroyed model from your unit back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models. Roll one D3, adding 1 to the result for each Miracle dice you discarded. That model is set back up with that number of wounds remaining (up to its starting number of wounds).

RESTRICTIONS: You cannot select Saint Celestine as the target of this Stratagem. You cannot select the same CHARACTER as the target of this Stratagem more than once per battle.

stratagems.name: SUFFERING AND SACRIFICE
stratagems.type: Hallowed Martyrs – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Suffering is a staple prayer for the Adepta Sororitas, and a martyr’s fate only brings greater glory to the God-Emperor.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Start of the Fight phase.

TARGET: One Adepta Sororitas Infantry or Adepta Sororitas Walker unit from your army.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of its attacks.

stratagems.name: SANCTIFIED IMMOLATION
stratagems.type: Hallowed Martyrs – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The enemy must perish, even if we perish with them. The enemy must burn, even if we burn with them.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though It was just destroyed.

EFFECT: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

stratagems.name: SPIRIT OF THE MARTYR
stratagems.type: Hallowed Martyrs – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Even with their dying act, the Sororitas mete out the Emperor’s judgement.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: PRAISE THE FALLEN
stratagems.type: Hallowed Martyrs – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The death of a Battle Sister only stirs the survivors to fight harder to exact swift vengeance.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

enhancements.name: Saintly Example
enhancements.legend: With her final breath is another heroine elevated to the ranks of sainthood, her death stirring her greatest companions to finish what she started.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. When the bearer is destroyed, you gain an additional D3 Miracle dice.

enhancements.name: Through Suffering, Strength
enhancements.legend: With every wound inflicted on their mortal form does this holy warrior’s strength grow, their suffering a prayer to the God-Emperor.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. If the bearer has lost one or more wounds, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

enhancements.name: Chaplet of Sacrifice
enhancements.legend: The most hallowed martyrs of the Sisterhood have added beads to this chaplet. Such a relic can be a burden, for it carries the righteousness of those who uphold everything the Sisterhood stands for.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. At the end of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll 1 Miracle dice from your Miracle dice pool and return it to your Miracle dice pool showing the new result you rolled. When doing so, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll up to 3 Miracle dice in this way instead.

enhancements.name: Mantle of Ophelia
enhancements.legend: The Mantle of Ophelia was once the badge of office for the Prioress of the Convent Sanctorum, and was worn by Helena the Virtuous, a Living Saint and one of the most revered leaders in the history of the Adepta Sororitas. The mantle is thought to have sacred powers of protection, for Helena was said to have anointed it with the Tears of the Emperor, a phial of blood-like liquid meticulously collected over a century from weeping statues of the Emperor found across the cardinal worlds of the Imperium.
enhancements.description: Canoness or Palatine model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

rule.name: Desperate for Redemption
rule.legend: The penitent masses vow to wash clean their dishonour with their foe’s blood.
rule.description:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the following Vows of Atonement to be active for your army until the start of the next battle round. You can only select each Vow of Atonement once per battle.

The Path of the Penitent

With psalms on their lips, the faithful hurl themselves forward.

Add 3" to the Move characteristic of PENITENT models from your army.

Absolution in Battle

The penitents smite the Emperor's foes with unmatched zeal.

Each time a unit from your army is selected to fight, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by PENITENT models in that unit.

Death Before Disgrace

Even the most grievous wound cannot stop a penitent warrior in their quest to earn redemption in the eyes of the Emperor.

Each time a PENITENT model from your army is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: PASSION OF THE PENITENT
stratagems.type: Penitent Host – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The penitent are full of a burning passion to inflict suffering upon the faithless.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase.

TARGET: One PENITENT unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a PENITENT model in your unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

stratagems.name: PURITY OF SUFFERING
stratagems.type: Penitent Host – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Suffering is the penance by which the faithful affirm their devotions. To shore in the agonies suffered by the God-Emperor and his saints without embracing death is the mark of fidelity to the Imperial Creed.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One PENITENT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, PENITENT models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

stratagems.name: LASH OF GUILT
stratagems.type: Penitent Host – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Agony and guilt drive these sinners forward. Only by meeting the enemy in combat may they find repentance or, Jailing that, the comfort of death.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, just before a PENITENT unit from your army Advances.

TARGET: That PENITENT unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the PENITENT ENGINES keyword, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

stratagems.name: FINAL REDEMPTION
stratagems.type: Penitent Host – Epic Deed Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Those seeking absolution in the eyes of the Emperor will gladly give their last drop of blood to defy his enemies.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Any phase.

TARGET: One PENITENT unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

EFFECT: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

stratagems.name: DEVOUT FANATICISM
stratagems.type: Penitent Host – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The God-Emperor's faithful followers, heedless of incoming fire, leap forth to deliver his furious judgement in the press of melee
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

TARGET: One PENITENT unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Roll one D6: your unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of enemy units.

stratagems.name: BOUNDLESS ZEAL
stratagems.type: Penitent Host – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The urge to absolve their sins and destroy the enemy drives the penitents to push their tortured bodies beyond their mortal limits.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army Falls Back.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit has the PENITENT keyword, it is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back instead.

enhancements.name: Psalm of Righteous Judgement
enhancements.legend: Invoking the strength of the God-Emperor, this warrior bellows psalms, which roar above the din of battle. Incited by these fire and brimstone recitations, the penitent warriors carve apart their enemies, every kill bringing them closer to redemption.
enhancements.description: ADEPTA SORORITAS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit is destroyed by a penitent unit from you army, you can discard 1 Miracle dice then gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value of 6.

enhancements.name: Verse of Holy Piety
enhancements.legend: As the sanctified verses of the Ecclesiarchy’s holy psalms roar across the battlefield, divine might infuses the devout.
enhancements.description: PENITENT model only. Once per battle, at the start of the battle round, select one Vow of Atonement. Until the start of the next battle round, that Vow of Atonement is active for the bearer’s unit in addition to any that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Vow of Atonement this battle.

enhancements.name: Refrain of Enduring Faith
enhancements.legend: Faith is the shield of the righteous. The passionate benedictions of the pious may bestow the blessings of the God-Emperor.
enhancements.description: PENITENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

enhancements.name: Catechism of Divine Penitence
enhancements.legend: To share in the agonies of the penitent and guide them to redemption is a most holy undertaking. Thus do many of the Adepta Sororitas’ commanders willingly fight by the side of those cast out by the Sisterhood.
enhancements.description: CANONESS, PALATINE or MINISTORUM PRIEST model only. The bearer gains the PENITENT keyword and, during the Declare Battle Formations step, can be attached to a REPENTIA SOUAD unit.

rule.name: Bloody Redemption
rule.legend: Absolution can only be earned by spilling the blood of the enemy. Most will only find redemption in death, their last acts of violence absolving them of their sins against the Imperial faith.
rule.description: The first time each turn that you gain 1 Miracle dice as the result of an ARCO-FLAGELLANTS or REPENTiA SqUAD unit from your army being destroyed, do not roll a D6; that Miracle dice has a value of 6 instead.

stratagems.name: CONTEMPT FOR DEATH
stratagems.type: Penitents and Pilgrims – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The desire for absolution lends the penitent hosts unnatural resilience in the face of superior foes.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: SLICK WITH GORE
stratagems.type: Penitents and Pilgrims – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: With chainsword and fist these warriors cut through the enemy until their bodies are coated in viscera and the foe quail before their bloody advance.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the battle, your unit is slick with gore. In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 6" of and visible to a unit from your army that is slick with gore, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that enemy unit is also Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. This cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

RESTRICTIONS: You cannot use this Stratagem while a unit from your army that is slick with gore is on the battlefield.

stratagems.name: FEVERED ZEALOTS
stratagems.type: Penitents and Pilgrims – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Driven on by the depths of their own zeal, these warriors pile through hatchways and bulkheads, desperate to slaughter the blasphemers.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army opens a Hatchway.

TARGET: That ADEPTA SORORITAS unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the turn, your unit has the Fights First ability.

stratagems.name: SAVAGE FRENZY
stratagems.type: Penitents and Pilgrims – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: A tide of screaming zealots swarms over the enemy, flailing wildly with deadly weapons and slaughtering any who attempt to flee.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.

TARGET: One ARcO-fLAGELLANTS or REPENTIA SqUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, when that enemy unit Falls Back, models in it must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

enhancements.name: Fervent Ferocity
enhancements.legend: So inflamed by their own fiery rhetoric is this priest, that terrible wounds go unnoticed as they hurl themselves towards the foe.
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

enhancements.name: Sanctification Rituals
enhancements.legend: As their forces seize territory, this pious leader leads holy rituals intended to purify and ward captured ground against the blasphemer.
enhancements.description: The bearer can perform the Secure Site Tactical Manoeuvre as if it had the BATTLELINE keyword.

rule.name: The Emperor Protects
rule.legend: The Adepta Sororitas fight to defend the Imperial faith from those who would seek to bring about its ruin. The Battle Sisters believe that the light of the Emperor falls upon those who defend his sacred realm, lending them divine protection from the blades and bullets of the enemy.
rule.description: Each time an attack targets an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army (excluding ARCO-FLAGELLANTS and REPENTiA SqUAD units), if that unit is within range of an objective marker, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against that attack. If that unit also performed the Secure Site Tactical Manoeuvre in your previous Shooting phase, models in it have a 3+ invulnerable save against that attack instead.

stratagems.name: PRAYER OF PRECISION
stratagems.type: Pious Protectors – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: A whispered prayer prior to aiming steadies the hand and ensures each round strikes its mark.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your Shooting phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

EFFECT: You can discard 1 Miracle dice. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If you discarded a Miracle dice, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

stratagems.name: FINAL TESTAMENT
stratagems.type: Pious Protectors – Battle Tactic Stratagem
stratagems.legend: The Sisters of Battle expect to die in battle. They strive to take as many blasphemers as possible with them to the grave.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

EFFECT: You can discard 1 Miracle dice. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if you discarded a Miracle dice: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: REPEL BOARDERS
stratagems.type: Pious Protectors – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: Adepta Sororitas purgation teams excel at repelling boarding parties, repelling wave after wave of boarders with stoic defiance.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Movement or Charge phase.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that has not fired Overwatch this phase.

EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack while firing Overwatch, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ is required to score a hit, instead of an unmodified 6. In addition, until the end of the phase, each time you roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in your unit, you can re-roll the result.

stratagems.name: RADIANT ILLUMINATION
stratagems.type: Pious Protectors – Strategic Ploy Stratagem
stratagems.legend: As the enemy hurl themselves forth, the Emperor's divine light shines upon his faithful, blinding the unbelievers with its radiant glare.
stratagems.description:
WHEN: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.

TARGET: One ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army (excluding ARcO-fLAGELLANTS and REPENTIA SqUAD units) that was selected as a target of that charge.

EFFECT: You can discard 1 Miracle dice. Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit. If you discarded a Miracle dice, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made forthat enemy unit instead.

enhancements.name: Martial Discipline
enhancements.legend: Allied to their faith, the Adepta Sororitas possess discipline and training beyond that of most warriors. This leader is an expert in close-range combat and boarding actions, ordering their troops to lure the enemy into punishing fusillades and gun down fleeing foes with ruthless efficiency.
enhancements.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

enhancements.name: Limitless Resolve
enhancements.legend: This leader is a bombastic commander whose faith is matched by their boundless charisma. With the intonation of a single battle-psalm they may restore order and morale to a shattered formation.
enhancements.description: While the bearer is on the battlefield, friendly Battle-shocked ADEPTA SORORITAS models (excluding ARCO-FLAGELLANTS and REPENTiA SqUAD models) have an Objective Control characteristic of 1.
